title: Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded

'''''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded''''' is a ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' book written by [[Bill Smith]] and published by [[West End Games]] in [[August]] [[1996]]. It supersedes the [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)|first]] and [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game, Second Edition|second editions]] of the core book.

The book featured game rules, game master advice, and the standalone adventure ''[[The Pirates of Prexiar]]''.

{{Book-stub}}

==Contents==
Player Section
*Introduction
*[[Blaine Hansom]]
*[[Cantina Breakout]]
*Player Handout
*Blank Character Template
*Chapter One: Characters
*Chapter Two: Attributes

Gamemaster Section
*Chapter Three: How to Gamemaster
*Chapter Four: The Rules
*Chapter Five: Combat and Injuries
*Chapter Six: Movement and Chases
*Chapter Seven: Space Travel and Combat
*Chapter Eight: Running Battles
*Chapter Nine: [[The Force/Legends|The Force]]

Adventure Section
*Chapter Ten: Running Adventures
*Chapter Eleven: Designing Adventures
*Chapter Twelve: [[The Pirates of Prexiar]]

Universe Section
*Chapter Thirteen: The Galaxy
*Chapter Fourteen: Gamemaster Characters
*Chapter Fifteen: Aliens
*Chapter Sixteen: Creatures
*Chapter Seventeen: Weapons & Equipment
*Chapter Eighteen: [[Droid/Legends|Droids]]
*Chapter Nineteen: Vehicles
*Chapter Twenty: [[Starship/Legends|Starships]]
*Chapter Twenty-One: Planets
